title: Centre Principal /Vice Principal (Yishun)
description:
We are seeking an experienced and dedicated Centre Principal / Vice Principal to lead our pre-school’s daily operations and ensure the highest standards of care, education, and compliance. The ideal candidate is a strong leader with excellent communication skills and a passion for early childhood education.

Job Responsibilities:

  • Lead a team to manage the daily operation of the center according to the school's policies and quality standards;
  • Manage teaching staff to develop and deliver the school's holistic and age-appropriate bilingual pre-school curriculum;
  • Communicate with parents effectively, and build rapport and trusted relationships with parents;
  • Handle administrative work to meet the compliance and regulatory requirements for the centre's operation.

Job Requirements:

  • Singaporean
  • Minimum Diploma in Early Childhood Care and Education - Leadership or its equivalent;
  • Must have at least 5 years of relevant work experience as center supervisor in pre-school or childcare setting;
  • Strong leadership, able to lead a team and manage people;
  • High sense of responsibility, positive and a can-do work attitude;
  • Excellent communication and interpersonal skills;
  • Basic computer skills.

Benefits:

  • A strong team culture built upon passionate, motivated and responsible people;
  • Attractive year-end bonus, profit sharing incentive, and rewards for committed staff;
  • Appealing leave and benefit package for work-life balance and continuous learning;
  • Opportunity to build a proud pre-school brand with founding team and entrepreneurial experience.

postedCompany.description:
We put our children’s interest at forefront.

  • Everything we do in our business is guided by the single most important question of whether it is for the best interest of our children, from their safety and hygiene to their learning and development. We never compromise the quality of work for our children.

We work for our parents every day.

  • We are doing a service job and parents are our clients. We must be attentive to parents' needs, stand in their shoes, and be willing to serve them in order to achieve their best satisfaction with our quality service. 

We stress team work on everything.

  • Only when we work as a team not individual, we can achieve strong business performance and workplace harmony. A great team needs to get job done, makes team member happy, and creates learning for everyone in the team.

We hold professional standards all the time.

  • We are proud to be professionals and must hold our professional standards at work. We need to project our professional image, conduct our professional behaviours, and deliver our professional work when dealing with our parents, children and colleagues. 

We value people and reputation most.

  • Our success relies on the quality of people that we recruit, motivate, develop and retain in our business, and the reputation our people build together. Quality people and best reputation are our core assets.
postedCompany.name: RAFFLES KIDZ (NORTH) PTE. LTD.
